full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me create the LLM usage JSON files for Part B following the Part A format but with the additional fields (task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification)
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI provided the JSON template structure with the Part B-specific fields: task_tag for categorizing which task the interaction relates to, code_used_verbatim as a boolean flag, and student_modification as a required field when code was used verbatim. It also included the top_5_prompts section format.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Got the JSON template structure with the new fields. I filled in all the actual interactions honestly from my work log
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: All interactions are real and complete

top_5_prompts.prompt: Help me create the LLM usage JSON files for Part B following the Part A format but with the additional fields (task_tag, code_used_verbatim, student_modification)
top_5_prompts.why_asked: Needed the correct JSON structure for Part B disclosure files

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for the corresponding task in Part B.
